overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a sunlit dirt path through a dense forest. The character moves steadily through natural woodland terrain with tall trees, undergrowth, and occasional rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with large oak tree

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords strapped to his back, moving at a consistent pace through the woodland

entered.detail: Massive oak tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches dominating the left side of the path
Winding dirt trail with visible tire tracks and patches of grass growing through
Tall grass and ferns lining the left side of the trail
Dense vegetation and bushes on the right side of the path
Dense tree line forming the horizon with varying shades of green foliage

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt trail through an open forest area. A large oak tree dominates the left side of the path while dense grass and undergrowth line both sides of the trail. The canopy is visible overhead with clear blue sky peeking through.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with rock formations

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the winding path, navigating past rocks and fallen logs scattered along the right side

entered.detail: Cluster of gray rocks and boulders of various sizes along the right edge of the path
Decaying wooden logs lying among the rocks on the right side

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more enclosed as Geralt moves deeper into the forest. Scattered rocks and fallen logs appear on the right side of the trail while the large oak tree from the previous section falls behind. The vegetation grows denser, partially obscuring the sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past a wooden fence on the left side while continuing along the forest trail, approaching a more open area ahead

entered.detail: Rustic wooden fence made of rough-hewn posts and horizontal rails running parallel to the path
Large moss-covered rock formation rising from the ground on the right side

segments.scene_description: A rustic wooden fence appears on the left side of the path as Geralt continues walking. The trail remains surrounded by dense forest vegetation with rocky outcrops visible on the right. The path curves gently as it leads toward a more open clearing in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit dirt trail that transitions from an open woodland into a more enclosed forest path. It begins with Geralt walking past a dominant oak tree under a canopy that reveals glimpses of a clear blue sky. As he moves deeper into the forest, the environment becomes more secluded, with the large oak falling behind and the sky partially obscured by thickening vegetation and scattered fallen logs. The scene then shifts as a rustic wooden fence appears on the left, guiding the camera along a gentle curve past rocky outcrops. Finally, the dense foliage begins to thin as the path leads toward a more open clearing in the distance.
